package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for json_decoder_recreated_per_item: json decoders recreated for each item payload.
type CaseJsonDecoderRecreatedPerItemDTO struct {
    ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
    Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

func PositiveJsonDecoderRecreatedPerItem(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseJsonDecoderRecreatedPerItemDTO) error {
    for _, item := range items {
        payload, _ := json.Marshal(item)
        decoder := json.NewDecoder(bytes.NewReader(payload))
        var decoded CaseJsonDecoderRecreatedPerItemDTO
        _ = decoder.Decode(&decoded)
    }
    return nil
}
